entities.name: Astaroth
entities.raw_quote: per magistrum vestrum Astaroth, vt compareatisj in forma furis et furti

entities.name: Asef Caroth
entities.raw_quote: a magistro vestro Asef Caroth vobis concessa

entities.name: Haram
entities.raw_quote: in sompnis Haram, spiritus benignus, et inflammet cor meum

entities.name: Semiforas

attributes.significance: great name written on the front of Aaron

entities.raw_quote: hoc est nomen magnum Semiforas, quod erat [107r] scriptum in fronte Aaron

entities.name: Tuditha, Stehiha, Alpha, Draco, Mariodo, Ypanon

attributes.usage: names to be written in bat blood for obtaining a horse

entities.raw_quote: hec nomina cum sa[n]gwine vespertilionis: Tuditha, Stehiha, Alpha, Draco, Mariodo, Ypanon.

entities.name: Layalym, Lyalgnea, Yalgnal, Narath, Lybarye, Lymbaros, Lyaslam
entities.raw_quote: Et hec sunt nomina, scilicet: Layalym, Lyalgnea, Yalgnal, Narath, Lybarye, Lymbaros, Lyaslam.

entities.name: Ritual for discovering hidden treasure

attributes.timing: waxing moon, Sunday, Sun in Leo, morning
attributes.actions: confess sins, sprinkle with holy water, pray at crucifix, face East

entities.raw_quote: A[d] sciendum vbi thesaurum sit absconditum... luna crescente, videlicet die dominico, sole existente in leone, de mane.

entities.name: Ritual for obtaining a horse

attributes.method: write names on cloth at dusk using bat blood

entities.raw_quote: Ad equum habendum, hoc scribatur in hostio domus vacue in crepusculo noctis... cum sa[n]gwine vespertilionis

entities.name: Ritual for invisibility

attributes.method: sacrifice a white dove and draw a figure with its blood

entities.raw_quote: sume albam columbam... Et scribe de huiusc collumbe sangwine hanc figuram.

entities.name: white dove
entities.raw_quote: sume albam columbam, die Sabbati de nocte

entities.name: salis petri (saltpeter)
entities.raw_quote: Item recipe salis petri, vitrioli, rorani

relationships.from: Tuditha, Stehiha, Alpha, Draco, Mariodo, Ypanon

summary: This chunk contains several distinct magical experiments: a conjuration using Astaroth to identify thieves, a ritual involving the spirit Haram to find treasure through dreams, and instructions for obtaining a horse using names written in bat blood. It also details a method for invisibility via a dove sacrifice and provides astrological timing for inscriptions.
key_passages: per magistrum vestrum Astaroth, vt compareatisj in forma furis et furti
in sompnis Haram, spiritus benignus, et inflammet cor meum et mentem meum, vt sciam thesaurum invenire
hec nomina cum sa[n]gwine vespertilionis: Tuditha, Stehiha, Alpha, Draco, Mariodo, Ypanon.
sume albam columbam... Et scribe de huiusc collumbe sangwine hanc figuram.
